title: Session Playbook - All Times in SAST (UTC+2)
note: Forex/gold/BTC follow these sessions. Deriv synthetics (V50/V75/V100) are session-agnostic and tradeable identically 24/7.

sydney.character: Thin liquidity, small ranges. Only AUD pairs have genuine flow.

tokyo.character: Defined ranges, respect of levels, yen pairs most active. Ranges built here become London's liquidity targets.

london.character: First real volume of the day. Classic pattern: sweep the Asian range, then run the true direction. Best for gold and all majors.

key_windows.09:00-10:30: Opening drive / Judas swing - highest scalping quality
key_windows.12:00-14:00: Lunch lull - reduce activity, ranges compress

new_york.character: Largest volume, biggest candles, real breakouts. USDCAD only comes alive here. US data drops at 14:30 SAST.

key_windows.14:30-16:00: NY open momentum - best day-trade entries of the day
key_windows.15:30-18:00: London/NY overlap - maximum liquidity of the entire day
key_windows.21:00-23:00: Late NY fade - ranges form, momentum dies, book profits

after_hours_master_plan_00_05_sast.overview: 22:00-03:00 UTC. NY has closed, Sydney opens 00:00, Tokyo opens 02:00. The thinnest window for USD/CAD/gold; genuinely active for AUD, JPY and all synthetics.

instrument_verdicts.V50: TRADE - safest night instrument, full playbook applies
instrument_verdicts.V75: TRADE - full playbook applies, respect spike stops
instrument_verdicts.V100: TRADE with halved size, with-trend setups only, max 3 trades
instrument_verdicts.USDJPY: TRADE from 02:00 (Tokyo open) - opening drive + first pullback
instrument_verdicts.AUDUSD: TRADE - Sydney/Tokyo home hours, modest targets 5-8 pips
instrument_verdicts.BTCUSD: MEAN-REVERSION ONLY - fade NY range sweeps, never trade breakouts here
instrument_verdicts.XAUUSD: AVOID - spread widening kills scalps; only mark levels
instrument_verdicts.USDCAD: AVOID COMPLETELY - both home markets closed, pure noise

hour_by_hour.00:00-01:00: Rollover: forex/gold spreads spike, avoid all fiat entries. Synthetics unaffected - trade V50/V75.
hour_by_hour.01:00-02:00: Pre-Tokyo drift. Mark late-NY highs/lows on JPY/AUD. Synthetics normal. Japanese data possible 01:30/01:50.
hour_by_hour.02:00-03:30: Tokyo open. USDJPY opening drive + pullback entries. AUDUSD momentum if Sydney range breaks. AU data risk 03:30.
hour_by_hour.03:30-05:00: Established Tokyo rhythm: trade Tokyo-range edges on JPY/AUD, continue synthetic playbook.

night_risk_rules: Halve normal position size on all fiat instruments (thin books exaggerate slippage)
Synthetics keep normal size (V100 excepted) - their liquidity is engineered, not real
Predefine the session before it starts: instruments, setups, max trades, loss cap
Fatigue check: if you skip your checklist even once, end the session
Hard stop at 05:00 - do not bleed into pre-London chop with a tired mind

weekly_rhythm.monday: Ranges establish; often retraces the weekend/Friday move. Trade smaller.
weekly_rhythm.tuesday_thursday: Best trend days of the week for forex and gold.
weekly_rhythm.friday: Morning tradeable; after 18:00 SAST positions square up - book profits, avoid new day trades.
weekly_rhythm.sunday_open: 23:00 SAST forex reopen can gap - never hold tight-stop trades over the weekend. Synthetics have no gaps.
weekly_rhythm.news_calendar_rule: Check high-impact USD/AUD/CAD/JPY events daily. 15 min before to 15 min after = no fiat trades. Synthetics are immune.
